'''gatotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hicksville|hicksville]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-t-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hicksville|hicksville]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gatotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gætetheth|gætetheth]] || [[word:gætethej|gætethej]] || [[word:gætethesh|gætethesh]] || [[word:gætethe|gætethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gatotothoth|gatotothoth]] || [[word:gatotothoj|gatotothoj]] || [[word:gatotothosh|gatotothosh]] || [[word:gatototho|gatototho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gatothoth|gatothoth]] || [[word:gatothoj|gatothoj]] || [[word:gatothosh|gatothosh]] || [[word:gatotho|gatotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gatofthoth|gatofthoth]] || [[word:gatofthoj|gatofthoj]] || [[word:gatofthosh|gatofthosh]] || [[word:gatofthof|gatofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gatothotho|gatothotho]] || [[word:gatothojo|gatothojo]] || [[word:gatothosho|gatothosho]] || [[word:gatothoko|gatothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gatothoth|gatothoth]] || [[word:gatothoj|gatothoj]] || [[word:gatothosh|gatothosh]] || [[word:gatotho|gatotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gatothothol|gatothothol]] || [[word:gatothojol|gatothojol]] || [[word:gatothoshol|gatothoshol]] || [[word:gatothokol|gatothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gatothothotho|gatothothotho]] || [[word:gatothojojo|gatothojojo]] || [[word:gatothoshosho|gatothoshosho]] || [[word:gatothoko|gatothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gatothothon|gatothothon]] || [[word:gatothojon|gatothojon]] || [[word:gatothoshon|gatothoshon]] || [[word:gatothokon|gatothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gatothothoro|gatothothoro]] || [[word:gatothojoro|gatothojoro]] || [[word:gatothoshoro|gatothoshoro]] || [[word:gatothokoro|gatothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
